title: Apple Reportedly Tests AI Tool to Record, Transcribe Genius Bar Interactions
summary: Apple is reportedly testing an AI tool to record, transcribe, and summarize conversations between customers and its Genius Bar employees. Live Notes is reportedly a pilot program intended to make life easier for Genius Bar employees.
caption: output/2026-07-20/apple-reportedly-tests-ai-tool-to-record-transcribe-genius-bar-interac.txt
